title: Abersaith Aviary
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Abersaith Aviary''' was an exotic bird preserve located in an enclosed canyon and was one of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag's]] primary tourist attractions. The immense [[Abersaith Canyon]] was kilometers wide in spots and two dozen kilometers long. The aviary was home to some twenty million species of birds culled from a variety of worlds. Many were kept in specific artificial ecosystems separated by weak [[Repulsor field/Legends|repulsor fields]]. The top of the canyon was separated by weak repulsor fields and enormous canopies of [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]].

Visitors were free to hike down the sides of the canyon, wander through its lush gardens, and tour its various crannies in rented skiffs. The aviary was not only a popular place for lovers but also a favored rendezvous for spies and scoundrels engaging in corporate espionage.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
